title: Compiler pipeline unification (run/build/LSP spine)

source.subject: refactor: Compiler DRY Refactor and Pipeline unification

body:
Single `beskid_pipeline` spine for analyze/run/build/LSP; eliminates divergent compiler paths that blocked consistent corelib test harness behavior.

## What shipped

- DRY refactor and pipeline unification (`425e1e7`)
- Shared resolved pipeline input for `beskid run` and `beskid build`
- Foundation for `just corelib` → `beskid_cli test --all-targets` gate

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`425e1e7`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/425e1e7)
- **Completed:** 2026-06-04

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-corelib-complete`
